M A R K C O M P L E T E
In this quick video tutorial, Dean's email manager Tanner is going to walk you through the simple steps to setting up a free email account so you
can email people in bulk and then also, the best email practices to get people to sign up for your event. While this may seem simple, it is very
powerful!
S E S S I O N O V E R V I E W
TAKE NOTES
ACTION STEPS
Pick an email service provider.
Start building your email list (if you don't already have a large one).
Remember the "Hook - Story - Close" layout to translate to your emails.
Remember that communication should be relationship and not transactional.
Master the 9 word email that Dean teaches in Module 3 lesson 1.
